description: The Set Normalized Position node tells a IPlayable to jump to a position upon impulse.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]):
=== Target (IPlayable) ===

The IPlayable to set the position on.
fields.NormalizedPosition:
Set the normalized position of the playback on the target.
Note this is the normalized position, so the valid range is 0 - 1.
fields.Next: Sends an impulse after the initial call.
